title: Rooster
meaning_summary: This song holds value through a recognizable core riff or chorus, strong emotional payoff, and steady replay.
revenue_drivers: Classic replay value and catalog streaming keep major rock songs relevant.
Cultural familiarity supports long-tail listener demand.
Sync placements and live-culture recognition help extend the song's revenue life.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Rooster is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
